attendance_requirement.attendance_reason: Authenticated DevHub review and draft work is account-scoped and must remain user-attended.

selector_observations.name: DevHub home landmark
selector_observations.evidence: Stable accessible main landmark observed in fixture surface map.

selector_observations.name: My Permits and Requests link
selector_observations.evidence: Public DevHub guidance identifies account-scoped permit and request review.

selector_observations.name: Save draft control
selector_observations.evidence: Reversible draft control only; final submit controls remain blocked.

preview_text.title: Attended DevHub handoff preview
preview_text.body: I can review account-scoped status information or stage a reversible draft while you remain present. I will stop before upload, certification, submission, scheduling, cancellation, payment, or account changes and ask for exact confirmation where review is allowed.
preview_text.redaction_note: This packet intentionally contains only labels, policies, and redacted workflow evidence. It contains no credentials, cookies, auth state, screenshots, traces, HAR data, or private page values.

exact_confirmation_checkpoints.confirmation_prompt: Confirm that you want me to review this DevHub surface in read-only mode while you remain present.
Confirm that you want me to stage these draft values only, without uploading, certifying, submitting, scheduling, cancelling, or paying.
This control may affect an official record. I will stop here and leave the action to you unless a separate attended playbook permits it.

blocked_official_controls.reason: Official submission is consequential and outside reversible draft mode.
Certification requires direct user review and action.

blocked_official_controls.control: Upload correction or attachment to official record
blocked_official_controls.reason: Official uploads can alter the record and require attended confirmation and user action.
Financial workflows are blocked, including payment detail entry and final payment execution.
Inspection scheduling changes are official actions.

blocked_official_controls.control: Cancel, withdraw, extend, or reactivate request
blocked_official_controls.reason: Lifecycle changes are consequential official controls.

blocked_official_controls.control: Account creation or account security changes
blocked_official_controls.reason: Account and security actions require separate human-run handling.
